question: What are the names of the employees who never received any evaluation?
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM employee WHERE Employee_ID NOT IN (SELECT Employee_ID FROM evaluation)
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.identifier FROM employee AS T1 WHERE T1.staff_member_key NOT IN (SELECT T2.staff_member_key FROM evaluation AS T2)
raw_response: SELECT T1.identifier FROM employee AS T1 WHERE T1.staff_member_key NOT IN (SELECT T2.staff_member_key FROM evaluation AS T2)
